results.name: toolforge-acd
results.title: Account Creation Dashboard
results.description: Outreach Tool for Wikimedia Bangladesh — a tool that facilitates Wikimedia account creation during offline events, workshops, edit-a-thons, and outreach programs, helping organizers register participants efficiently while complying with Wikimedia account creation limits. It can streamline participant onboarding, track created accounts, and support event management.

results.name: toolforge-linkid
results.title: LinkID Resolver
results.description: Open-source thin-proxy resolver for LinkID persistent identifiers. Resolves /r/<uuid>, /s/<uuid> and /l/<uuid> to current, health-checked destinations so Wikipedia citations survive link rot.

results.name: toolforge-meteofrancetoclimat
results.title: Météo-France vers modèle Climat
results.description: Génère le wikicode du modèle {{Climat}} pour les articles de Wikipédia à partir des données climatologiques publiques de Météo-France (fiches FICHECLIM, data.gouv.fr). On saisit un identifiant de station ou on recherche une commune, et l'outil produit le tableau des normales 1991-2020 et des records, prêt à coller dans l'article.

results.name: toolforge-projo
results.title: Generate a list of articles that could be appropriate for an editathon/editing project
results.description: Given a list of articles on a particular topic (from Petscan, etc), score them to find the N best articles for suggesting as part of a focused editathon or project. The score is calculated so that articles in the list with more pageviews count higher, while articles are penalized for having higher quality (a "room for improvement" metric).

results.name: toolforge-authors

results.name: toolforge-heber
results.title: Filter for reviewing Commons images that were used in declined drafts on the English Wikipedia
results.description:
This tool collates a view of the drafts declined on English Wikipedia and the images uploaded to Commons that they use. Coloured tags are used to indicate talk page warnings that have been issued. 
It has been running with very little change since 2021. It is very lightly used, but used most days. The information would be tedious to gather manually.
A historic record is kept in a dedicated database.

results.name: t2236665
results.title: 高敏裕 政治人物 維基百科
results.description: 高敏裕現任中華民國臺中市北區邱厝里里長，同時擔任台中市邱厝慈善協會負責人及國際獅子會300C-3區全國獅子會創會會長。 他以長期投入基層服務與地方慈善活動聞名。👤 個人背景與公職經歷現任職務：臺中市北區邱厝里里長（連續連任多屆）。政黨背景：無黨籍。

results.name: toolforge-tonnible
results.title: TonniBle Image Clustering API
results.description:
API for fetching results of image clustering using TonniBleStore.
Please contact nokibsarkar@gmail.com for your campaign to be added 
to the system. Once your campaign is added, you can access your clustered images
via endpoints listed below. Each campaign will have its own unique identifier,
and anyone can access clusters and images associated with your campaign. 
The clustering results are based on the embedding model and clustering algorithm
configured for your campaign in TonniBleStore. You must show/attribute 
the use of TonniBleStore and the embedding model used in your campaign in any
public display of the clustered images. It would both help us and be a great
recognition for the project if you could also mention the use of TonniBleStore
in your campaign's metadata or description when you upload images to Wikimedia 
Commons.
